p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x2) != x0(x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[T, U](h)
not is_injective_fn[T, U](h) or forall(x0: T, x1: T) { h(x1) != h(x0) or x1 = x0 } = true
(forall(x0: T) { not is_injective_fn[T, U](h) or forall(x1: T) { h(x0) != h(x1) or x0 = x1 } = true })
(forall(x0: T, x1: T) { not (h(x0) = h(x1) and x0 != x1) or not is_injective_fn[T, U](h) })
(forall(x0: T, x1: T) { not is_injective_fn[T, U](h) or h(x0) != h(x1) or x0 = x1 })
not forall(x0: T, x1: T) { h(x1) != h(x0) or x1 = x0 } or is_injective_fn[T, U](h)
exists(k0: T, k1: T) { h(k1) = h(k0) and k1 != k0 } or is_injective_fn[T, U](h)
exists(k0: T, k1: T) { h(k1) = h(k0) and k1 != k0 }
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: T) { h(k0) = h(w0) and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: T satisfy { h(w1) = h(w0) and w1 != w0 }
let w2: T satisfy { h(w2) = h(w0) and w2 != w0 }
function(x0: T, x1: T) { h(x0) != h(x1) or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)
exists(k0: T, k1: T) { h(k1) = h(k0) and k1 != k0 }
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: T) { h(k0) = h(w0) and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: T satisfy { h(w1) = h(w0) and w1 != w0 }
let w2: T satisfy { h(w2) = h(w0) and w2 != w0 }
function(x0: T, x1: T) { h(x0) != h(x1) or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: U) { not exists(k1: T) { f(k1) = k0 } }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { exists(k0: T1) { x0(k0) = x1 } } = is_surjective_fn[T1, T0](x0) }[U, T](f)
not is_surjective_fn[T, U](f) or forall(x0: U) { exists(k0: T) { f(k0) = x0 } } = true
(forall(x0: U) { not is_surjective_fn[T, U](f) or exists(k0: T) { f(k0) = x0 } })
not forall(x0: U) { exists(k0: T) { f(k0) = x0 } } or is_surjective_fn[T, U](f)
exists(k0: U) { forall(x0: T) { f(x0) != k0 } } or is_surjective_fn[T, U](f)

goal: exists(k0: U) { k0 = y and has_element_witness(k0) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0) { has_element_witness[T0](x0) = (x0 = x0) }[U](y)
not has_element_witness(y) or y = y
has_element_witness(y)
exists(k0: U) { k0 = y and has_element_witness(k0) }
let w0: U satisfy { y = w0 and has_element_witness(w0) }
w0 = y
has_element_witness(w0)
function(x0: U) { not has_element_witness(x0) }(w0)
exists(k0: B) { g(k0) = a }
let w0: B satisfy { g(w0) = a }
let w1: B satisfy { g(w1) = a }
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0, x2: T1) { fiber_predicate[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = (x0(x2) = x1) }[A, B](g, a, w0)
g(w0) != a or fiber_predicate(g, a, w0)
not fiber_predicate(g, a, w0) or g(w0) = a
function(x0: B) { not fiber_predicate(g, a, x0) }(w0)
exists(k0: B) { fiber_predicate(g, a, k0) }
let w0: B satisfy { fiber_predicate(g, a, w0) }
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1, x2: T0) { choose_or_default[T0](fiber_predicate[T1, T0](x0, x1), x2) = injection_inverse[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[B, A](g, a, default)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0, x2: T1) { fiber_predicate[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = (x0(x2) = x1) }[A, B](g, a, injection_inverse(g, default, a))
g(injection_inverse(g, default, a)) != a or fiber_predicate(g, a, injection_inverse(g, default, a))
not fiber_predicate(g, a, injection_inverse(g, default, a)) or g(injection_inverse(g, default, a)) = a
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0, x2: T1) { fiber_predicate[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = (x0(x2) = x1) }[A, B](g, a, x)
g(x) != a or fiber_predicate(g, a, x)
not fiber_predicate(g, a, x) or g(x) = a
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0, x2: T1) { fiber_predicate[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = (x0(x2) = x1) }[A, B](g, a, y)
g(y) != a or fiber_predicate(g, a, y)
not fiber_predicate(g, a, y) or g(y) = a
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0, x2: T1) { fiber_predicate[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = (x0(x2) = x1) }[A, B](g, g(b), b)
fiber_predicate(g, g(b), b)
not fiber_predicate(g, g(b), b) or g(b) = g(b)
not forall(x0: B) { not fiber_predicate(g, g(b), x0) or x0 = b } or not fiber_predicate(g, g(b), b)
not fiber_predicate(g, g(b), b) or exists(k0: B) { fiber_predicate(g, g(b), k0) and k0 != b }
exists(k0: B) { fiber_predicate(g, g(b), k0) and k0 != b }
let w0: B satisfy { fiber_predicate(g, g(b), w0) and w0 != b }
fiber_predicate(g, g(b), w0)
w0 != b
function(x0: B) { not fiber_predicate(g, g(b), x0) or b = x0 }(w0)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0, x2: T1) { fiber_predicate[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = (x0(x2) = x1) }[A, B](g, g(b), b)
fiber_predicate(g, g(b), b)
not fiber_predicate(g, g(b), b) or g(b) = g(b)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1, x2: T0) { choose_or_default[T0](fiber_predicate[T1, T0](x0, x1), x2) = injection_inverse[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[B, A](g, g(b), default)
exists(k0: B) { g(k0) = g(b) }
let w0: B satisfy { g(w0) = g(b) }
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) = x1 } = image_contains[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[B, A](g, g(b))
not exists(k0: B) { g(k0) = g(b) } or image_contains[A, B](g, g(b))
(forall(x0: B) { g(b) != g(x0) or image_contains[A, B](g, g(b)) })
image_contains[A, B](g, g(b))
(forall(x0: B) { b != x0 or image_contains[A, B](g, g(b)) })

function[T2, T3](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: T2 -> T3, x3: T3 -> T2, x4: T2) { x0.suc != x1 or schroeder_bernstein_step[T2, T3](x2, x3, schroeder_bernstein_iter[T2, T3](x2, x3, x4, x0)) = schroeder_bernstein_iter[T2, T3](x2, x3, x4, x1) }[A, B](n, n.suc, f, g, a)

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1 -> T0, x4: T0) { x0.suc != x1 or schroeder_bernstein_step[T0, T1](x2, x3, schroeder_bernstein_iter[T0, T1](x2, x3, x4, x0)) = schroeder_bernstein_iter[T0, T1](x2, x3, x4, x1) } }
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T0) { schroeder_bernstein_step[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x1(x0(x2)) }[A, B](f, g, schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, a, n))

goal: schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, a, Nat.0) = a

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: Nat, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T0, x3: T0) { Nat.zero != x0 or schroeder_bernstein_iter[T0, T1](x1, x2, x3, x0) = x3 } }

goal: exists(k0: A, k1: Nat) { not image_contains[A, B](g, k0) and schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, k0, k1) = a }

p.c: function(x0: A) { not exists(k0: Nat) { not image_contains[A, B](g, x0) and schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, x0, k0) = a } }(a)
(forall(x0: Nat) { not (not image_contains[A, B](g, a) and schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, a, x0) = a) })
(forall(x0: Nat) { schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, a, x0) != a or image_contains[A, B](g, a) })
(forall(x0: Nat) { schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, a, x0) != a })
function(x0: A, x1: Nat) { not (not image_contains[A, B](g, x0) and schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, x0, x1) = a) }(a, Nat.0)

goal: schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, start, Nat.0) = start

(forall(x0: A) { not exists(k0: Nat) { not image_contains[A, B](g, x0) and schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, x0, k0) = schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, start, pred) } or schroeder_bernstein_chain[A, B](f, g, schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, start, pred)) })

(forall(x0: A, x1: Nat) { schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, start, pred) != schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, x0, x1) or image_contains[A, B](g, x0) })
image_contains[A, B](g, start)

(forall(x0: A, x1: Nat) { not (not image_contains[A, B](g, x0) and schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, x0, x1) = schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, start, pred)) or schroeder_bernstein_chain[A, B](f, g, schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, start, pred)) })

goal: exists(k0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_chain[A, B](f, g, k0) and f(k0) = y }

p.c: function(x0: A) { not (schroeder_bernstein_chain[A, B](f, g, x0) and f(x0) = y) }(schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, start, pred))
not schroeder_bernstein_chain[A, B](f, g, schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, start, pred)) or f(schroeder_bernstein_iter[A, B](f, g, start, pred)) != y

function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1, x3: T0) { (if schroeder_bernstein_chain[T1, T0](x0, x1, x2) { x0(x2) } else { injection_inverse[T1, T0](x1, x3, x2) }) = schroeder_bernstein_map[T1, T0](x0, x1, x3, x2) }[B, A](f, g, a, lib(functions).identity_fn(default))
not schroeder_bernstein_chain[A, B](f, g, a) or schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, lib(functions).identity_fn(default), a) = f(a)
schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, lib(functions).identity_fn(default), a) = injection_inverse(g, lib(functions).identity_fn(default), a) or schroeder_bernstein_chain[A, B](f, g, a)
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[B](default)

function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1, x3: T0) { (if schroeder_bernstein_chain[T1, T0](x0, x1, x2) { x0(x2) } else { injection_inverse[T1, T0](x1, x3, x2) }) = schroeder_bernstein_map[T1, T0](x0, x1, x3, x2) }[B, A](f, g, a, default)
not schroeder_bernstein_chain[A, B](f, g, a) or schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, a) = f(a)
schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, a) = injection_inverse(g, default, a) or schroeder_bernstein_chain[A, B](f, g, a)

goal: schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, a2) = injection_inverse(g, default, a2)

not exists(k0: B) { g(k0) = a2 } or image_contains[A, B](g, a2)

goal: schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, a1) = injection_inverse(g, default, a1)
schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, a2) = injection_inverse(g, default, a2)
injection_inverse(g, default, a1) = injection_inverse(g, default, a2)

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) = x1 } = image_contains[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[B, A](g, a1)
not exists(k0: B) { g(k0) = a1 } or image_contains[A, B](g, a1)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) = x1 } = image_contains[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[B, A](g, a2)
not exists(k0: B) { g(k0) = a2 } or image_contains[A, B](g, a2)

goal: schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, a1) = schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, a2)
schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, a2) = schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, a1)
is_injective_fn[A, B](h) = forall(x0: A, x1: A) { h(x0) = h(x1) implies x0 = x1 }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x2) != x0(x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](h)
not is_injective_fn[A, B](h) or forall(x0: A, x1: A) { h(x1) != h(x0) or x1 = x0 } = true
(forall(x0: A) { not is_injective_fn[A, B](h) or forall(x1: A) { h(x0) != h(x1) or x0 = x1 } = true })
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { not (h(x0) = h(x1) and x0 != x1) or not is_injective_fn[A, B](h) })
not forall(x0: A, x1: A) { h(x1) != h(x0) or x1 = x0 } or is_injective_fn[A, B](h)
exists(k0: A, k1: A) { h(k1) = h(k0) and k1 != k0 }
let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A) { h(k0) = h(w0) and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: A satisfy { h(w1) = h(w0) and w1 != w0 }
let w2: A satisfy { h(w2) = h(w0) and w2 != w0 }
function(x0: A, x1: A) { h(x0) != h(x1) or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_chain[A, B](f, g, k0) and f(k0) = y }
exists(k0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, k0) = y }

p.c: function(x0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, x0) != y }(a)

goal: schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, g(y)) = injection_inverse(g, default, g(y))
exists(k0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, k0) = y }

p.c: function(x0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, x0) != y }(g(y))
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { exists(k0: T1) { x0(k0) = x1 } } = is_surjective_fn[T1, T0](x0) }[B, A](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default))
not is_surjective_fn[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default)) or forall(x0: B) { exists(k0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, k0) = x0 } } = true
(forall(x0: B) { not is_surjective_fn[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default)) or exists(k0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, k0) = x0 } })
not forall(x0: B) { exists(k0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, k0) = x0 } } or is_surjective_fn[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default))
exists(k0: B) { forall(x0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, x0) != k0 } } or is_surjective_fn[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default))
exists(k0: B) { forall(x0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, x0) != k0 } }
let w0: B satisfy { forall(x0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, x0) != w0 } }
function(x0: B) { exists(k0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, k0) = x0 } }(w0)
let w1: A satisfy { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, w1) = w0 }
let w2(arg0: B) -> w2_result: A satisfy { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, w2_result) = arg0 }
function(x0: B) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, w2(x0)) = x0 }(w0)
function(x0: A) { schroeder_bernstein_map(f, g, default, x0) != w0 }(w2(w0))
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { (is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) and is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) = is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default))

not is_bijection_fn[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default)) or (is_injective_fn[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default)) and is_surjective_fn[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default)))

not (is_injective_fn[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default)) and is_surjective_fn[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default))) or is_bijection_fn[A, B](schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default))
function(x0: A -> B) { not is_bijection_fn[A, B](x0) }(schroeder_bernstein_map[A, B](f, g, default))
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { (is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) and is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) = is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](f)
not is_bijection_fn[A, B](f) or (is_injective_fn[A, B](f) and is_surjective_fn[A, B](f))
not (is_injective_fn[A, B](f) and is_surjective_fn[A, B](f)) or is_bijection_fn[A, B](f)
function(x0: A -> B) { not is_bijection_fn[A, B](x0) }(f)
